sections.paragraph:
Original: נכח

Transliteration: nêkach

Phonetic: nay'-kakh

BDB Definition:

  1. be in front of
  2. in front of, opposite to, in the sight of, before, to the front, right on
  3. towards the front of, in front of, on behalf of, as far as in front of

Origin: from an unused root meaning to be straightforward

TWOT entry: 1365a

Part(s) of speech:
